programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: A survivalist has an emotional breakdown that puts his challenge at risk. His fellow survivalists are caught up in romantic complications, and he must find a way to push forward in the dangerous Colombian jungle.

programme.desc: In a brutal Mexican jungle known to be haunted by Mayan spirits, All-star survivalists Sarah and Trent are tormented by rain, predators and spirits of the rainforest. Then, two strangers try to survive in the crosshairs of Africa's deadliest predators.

programme.desc: Finding the actual Holy Grail is the holy grail for all global investigators, so Rob's on the case. He's following in the footsteps of the Knights Templars and unearthing new evidence that could prove the grail has been hidden in Scotland all this time.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Frozen in Fear
programme.desc: A marine biologist and a Special Forces veteran risk hypothermia at every turn as they take on Canada with no clothes. Bitter cold, torrential rain and wandering bears and moose make every night a struggle, and an obstinate chipmunk pushes their patience.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Diesel Brothers Vs. The World

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Blazer of Glory

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Don't Tread on Diesel

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Detroit Diesel Brothers
programme.desc: Heavy D begins converting a Vietnam-era bridge boat into the world's first-ever diesel-powered surf boat.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Get Pitted
programme.desc: Heavy D is in deep with his insane diesel-powered boat conversion and is on the verge of seeing his dreams sink. Meanwhile, the race is on to get their MegaTrucks in working order before the epic showdown in the Pit against the Dirty 7.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Wine Maker
programme.desc: Mike travels to the Napa Valley and gets extremely dirty as he takes on the unappealing job of making wine. Mike then rolls up his sleeves and gets dirty at a Kansas Cattle Ranch where he gets a lesson on how dirty the cattle business can be.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Steam Ship Cleaner
programme.desc: Travelling to San Diego, Mike joins forces with two dirty guys who have mastered the art of hydro seeding. Before diving into the mailbag to answer viewer's questions, Mike rolls up his sleeves and gets dirty on a steam ship that's over 100 years old.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Journey to the Ice Age
programme.desc: To find a viable sample of mammoth DNA, Josh Gates retrieves bone samples from the massive Batagay Crater. He then journeys far upriver to a site in the lawless Siberian wilderness where tusk hunters carve out troves of bones from the permafrost.

programme.desc: Richard and Aaron decide bigger is better, giving a red '67 Cadillac convertible the luxury treatment in a risky bid to attract a higher calibre of buyers.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Big Red Caddy, Part II

programme.desc: We meet Ashley and Dimitri Snowden and follow their bumpy journey of courting a young woman named Joselyn. The Alldredges court a potential sister wife named Melina, and Jeff's first wife, Vanessa, faces challenges with her pregnancy.

programme.desc: Jill is a wacky, lovable nanny who describes her fashion as 'medieval peasant.'

programme.desc: Tammilee from Spokane saves enough money to go on multiple vacations with her husband every year.

programme.desc: Georgia's April and Chasity are best friends and couponing partners who are saving up for new stockpile storage buildings.

programme.desc: Kelly shows her best friend her stockpile and takes her along on a shopping spree to show off her skills. Rebecca brings her skeptical husband along to spark some interest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Captain Sandy's Yachtrageous Moments
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and her crew relive the best and worst moments from three seasons sailing the Mediterranean. They recall unforgettable crews, over-the-top guests and the real action down below.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: All Hail the Queen
programme.desc: Motor yacht Sirocco braces for its most exclusive charter guest yet: The Queen of Versailles. João faces his old demons after a drunken night out as well as an increasingly defiant deck crew. A new third stew joins the boat who has Colin swooning.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: What Eze the Problem?
programme.desc: Hannah and Joao have a miscommunication over a guest excursion. In the galley, Anastasia is forced to prepare foods that go against her vegan lifestyle to please the charter guest, the 'Queen of Versailles.' June continues to struggle to impress Hannah.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: A Whole Different Ball Game
programme.desc: Baseball legend Johnny Damon comes on board with a group of his rowdiest friends making the crew work double-time. June struggles to keep her radio on, which leaves Hannah frustrated. Jack and Travis get in hot water when they fail to respond to an alarm.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Docked and Loaded
programme.desc: Captain Sandy continues her on-going battle with Sirocco's anchors, while Joao and Travis continue their deep dive to set the anchors free. Baseball star Johnny Damon and his family and friends deal with bad weather and a feisty yacht owner.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Monte Car-loco
programme.desc: The crew enjoys a day off at an exclusive resort in Monte Carlo, but some of them are faced with more than they bargained for. Joao and Hannah have a heart to heart, while June tries to open herself up to Hannah with not so favourable results.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry for Me, Sirocco
programme.desc: Captain Sandy finds one of the crew member's positions redundant. Joao finally confronts Jack on his lack of work ethic giving him an ultimatum. An overwhelmed Anastasia is pushed to her breaking point in the galley. Then, Colin makes a bold move.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: It's Ben a Long Time
programme.desc: Colin faces a tough decision and Anastasia accepts her new role, but Sandy wonders if she's now phoning her job in. An all-female group come on board and do their best to flirt with the deck crew. Jack and Aesha move in together.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Nauti Girls Need Love Too
programme.desc: Ben's first dinner doesn’t wow the guests as much as he had hoped leaving him questioning if he still has his sea legs. Anastasia has a hard time adjusting back to her old third stew role.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Holy Ship!

programme.desc: The NCIS team must ascertain who is lying, the wife or the mistress, after the women accuse each other of murdering a Navy Public Affairs officer. Also, Anthony DiNozzo Sr. helps a homeless woman who believes he is her father.

programme.title: NCIS: Charade
programme.desc: After Tony's identity is stolen by multiple perpetrators, the fake Special Agent DiNozzos begin blackmailing Senators.

programme.title: NCIS: Return to Sender
programme.desc: Gibbs and Senior FBI Agent T.C. Fornell unite after two British prisoners, including a former spy, escape and arrive stateside via a shipping container. Also, McGee is busy apartment hunting and determined to find out how DiNozzo bought his lavish place.

programme.title: NCIS: Homefront
programme.desc: When a 14-year-old foils a home invasion, Gibbs suspects the teenager is withholding pertinent details. Also, Director Vance and Senior FBI Agent Fornell travel to London as part of the ongoing escaped British spy case.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Crocodile Queen
programme.desc: The Crocodile Queen was Egypt's first female pharaoh, but we don't who she was, or why she took this sinister alter-ego. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Saturn's Death Star

programme.desc: In Virginia Beach, Virginia, almost 30 handguns were stolen after thieves broke through the roof of a gun store. Detectives try to secure the firearms before the thieves have time to sell the guns on the streets.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: They're Hitting the Highway
programme.desc: A stolen vehicle is found abandoned, rolling backwards down the street.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Fastest Feet in the Fleet
programme.desc: The Unit has their busiest night; a break is taken to see who is the fastest in the unit.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's Job Security
programme.desc: Task force patrols the streets at night incognito to track down unsuspecting thieves.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Let the Helicopter Take Him
programme.desc: The helicopter in the sky becomes useful when the team traces a wanted drug dealer driving in the area.

programme.title: American Justice: Death of a Bride
programme.desc: In September 1999, a New Jersey woman is murdered by her ex-boyfriend on her wedding day.

programme.title: American Justice: A Questionable Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Naramore was convicted of attempting to murder a 78-year-old terminally ill woman.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Full Moon Rising
programme.desc: It's a full moon in New Orleans, and sure enough, all night long, the calls for the EMTs seem to get crazier and crazier. There's a machete hacking, a man whose finger is bitten off by a dog and a guy stabbed by a man dating his ex-wife.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Trauma Drama
programme.desc: Brandon and Coop race to save a man's life after he was struck by a bullet in the chest. New Nightwatch Nation team Alyssa and Kasie are called to a special needs pediatric patient in Baton Rouge which reminds Alyssa of her own miracle baby at home.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Joe McHale and his tactical team are called in to coax an unstable man out of his hotel room after he stabs a hotel employee. But when the man turns the knife on himself, McHale and his squad must act quickly to save a life.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Charles 'Chip' Huth and Kansas City SWAT head out on a high-stakes drug-warrant. The team will make simultaneous hits on two locations in the same apartment complex.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: It's a tense situation as Sgt. Paul Hamilton and his squad get caught up in a high-speed car chase to bring down a suspected auto theft ring. Later, Paul's squad joins Huth's to double their efforts and hit two houses at once.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: SWAT team negotiator Jake Byas faces the toughest challenge of his career: dealing with an armed murder suspect barricaded on a ledge who's threatening to kill himself and anyone who tries to get him down; another team surrounds the home of a drug dealer.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: When Dallas patrol officers respond to a disturbance call, they find an armed parole violator intent on not returning to jail. The suspect fires at police and barricades himself in a bathroom. A SWAT negotiator is called in to talk the man out safely.

programme.title: Shattered: The Bodies Out Back
programme.desc: 1986. A 13-year-old girl escapes her captors, then lives in fear they'll return to kill her. A young boy learns his father's fate and realizes his nightmares are memories, and a prison break leads a rookie cop on the hunt for two ruthless murderers.

programme.title: Shattered: The House on Hamilton Avenue
programme.desc: In 2006, Officer Mike Kermon is the first to arrive at a house on Hamilton Avenue where neighbors believe shots have been fired. As he enters the quiet home, he has no idea that what he'll find inside will change his life forever.

programme.title: Shattered: No Good Deed
programme.desc: In 2009, one woman's long and painful struggle to overcome addiction and help others ends in a way no one ever saw coming.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Night Shift Nightmare
programme.desc: The naked body of 19-year-old Wanda Musk is found just miles from where she worked at local gas station. In the wake of the vicious killing, suspicions mount over several young men in the community including her ex-boyfriend and a troubled local teen.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Won't Tell Us Why
programme.desc: Richard and Ryan Girgis knew their father, Magdi Girgis, was a cheapskate, prone to violence, and not a particularly good father. But when their family was torn apart, neither wanted to admit deep down that they knew who was behind it.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Monster Inside Him
programme.desc: When Karen struck the deal that finally got her brother, Richard, out of her life, she didn't know he would turn his attention on another, his new wife, Vernetta. Neither woman realized the devastating impact Richard would have on both their lives.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Monster I Married
programme.desc: When Cindy first fell in love with Bobby, she never imagined that she would one day regret not committing murder. But years after she first discovered the horrifying truth, she is still haunted by the night when she decided not to kill him in his sleep.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Won't Tell Us Why
programme.desc: Richard and Ryan Girgis knew their father, Magdi Girgis, was a cheapskate, prone to violence, and not a particularly good father. But when their family was torn apart, neither wanted to admit deep down that they knew who was behind it.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Monster Inside Him
programme.desc: When Karen struck the deal that finally got her brother, Richard, out of her life, she didn't know he would turn his attention on another, his new wife, Vernetta. Neither woman realized the devastating impact Richard would have on both their lives.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Monster I Married
programme.desc: When Cindy first fell in love with Bobby, she never imagined that she would one day regret not committing murder. But years after she first discovered the horrifying truth, she is still haunted by the night when she decided not to kill him in his sleep.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Night Shift Nightmare
programme.desc: The naked body of 19-year-old Wanda Musk is found just miles from where she worked at local gas station. In the wake of the vicious killing, suspicions mount over several young men in the community including her ex-boyfriend and a troubled local teen.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: Two neighbors in New Brighton, Minnesota get along great until one of them catches Lyme Disease from the deer the other feeds on his property. The ensuing blame game, hostility and rising conflict ends in gunfire, death, injury and ruin.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Tunnel of Hate
programme.desc: An industrious woman and an ambitious man become neighbors when they buy adjoining houses. Both intend to restore the derelict homes to former glory, but when one of the renovations falls badly behind, it leads to conflict and a shocking murder.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: House of the Rising Gun
programme.desc: A single mother of four children finds the perfect house in New Orleans -- complete with a nice family next door. All is well until a robbery at the neighbor's home leads first to misunderstanding, then to paranoia, conflict and horrible bloodshed.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Nail in the Coffin
programme.desc: The promise of peaceful life in Tamarac, Florida is broken when the son of a newly arrived family befriends the neighborhood's most unruly kids. Bad blood between the neighbors boils over until things come to a horrifically violent end on Halloween.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Head in the Oven
programme.desc: Two neighbouring bachelors start out as friends. Harmless banter turns into threats eventually igniting an escalating war. The violence ends with a murder so shocking it is almost beyond belief.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Blood Secrets
programme.desc: A beloved grandmother is savagely murdered during a life and death struggle.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Connected by Murder
programme.desc: Three terrifying murders are connected together by one common thread. After years of frustration and heartbreak, three investigators, from three different states, must work together to solve the crimes.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Nowhere to Run
programme.desc: Two girls take a trip to the mall and never come home. Less than 24 hours later they are found shot to death in a desolate field. An investigation aims to resolve if they were killed by someone they knew or had been victims of a notorious serial killer.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Don't Shoot!
programme.desc: In 2015 in Newaygo County, Michigan, Marty and Glenna Duram are found gunned down in their own home. At the heart of the crime is their marriage. It's a bizarre story that involves drugs, stolen money, and a pet parrot who is an eyewitness.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: While You Were Sleeping
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Wangler and his wife Kathy appear to be living the middle-class dream: two sons, financial security, and a strong faith. But on September 4th, 2006, their façade falls down around them as a cold pre-meditated execution tears their family apart.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Love Sick
programme.desc: In 2014, police are called to a lifeless body in a trailer in Winona, Missouri. The owners, Jason and Stephanie McClurg, have suffered a series of misfortunes which have put their marriage under enormous pressure. But nobody expected it to lead to murder.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Control, Kill, Delete
programme.desc: Matt and Niqué Leili's love story is a modern romance. They meet online, create a blended family, and appear to have it all. But on July 8, 2011, the illusion of a happy marriage is torn apart forever.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Broken Trust
programme.desc: A teen girl with big ambitions of becoming a cop falls hard for the charm of an NYPD officer. He promises to make all her dreams come true but when affairs of the heart are complicated by the letter of the law.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Ancient UFO Encounters
programme.desc: Uncovering new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials and influenced ancient technologies, architecture and art.

programme.title: Military UFO Encounters
programme.desc: When it comes to identifying mysterious, unknown objects in our skies, there are few more qualified than pilots and astronauts. Through amazing first-hand accounts we'll learn that sightings by these experts are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: Deep Sea UFO Encounters
programme.desc: For decades UFO research has been directed to the skies, but newly declassified documents, along with advances in technology are leading UFO researchers to believe that UFOs may also be inhabiting our oceans.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The UFO Cover-Up
programme.desc: Discover the truth behind the UFO cover up. Attempt to discover if there is a hidden 'shadow government' that guards the truth, even from the President.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions have provided a wealth of new evidence to UFO researchers from top intelligence, government and scientific witnesses who were sworn to secrecy in life, but couldn't leave this earth without revealing the truth.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Taking Down a Huge New England Style Barn
programme.desc: Mark and the guys make a rare trip north to dismantle an enormous, 200-year old barn. The barn is so big it takes extra hands to get the barnwood down, and a crane to lift out the valuable beams.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building the New England Barn in South Carolina
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take on their biggest build yet. They resurrect the massive New England timber frame from last season as a family retreat in South Carolina. It's six days of heavy lifting, precision craftsmanship, and big fun.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Finished Product
programme.desc: Mark Bowe visits finished cabins he helped build in Montana, Texas, South Carolina, West Virginia and North Carolina. Then, there's a big surprise waiting for him in Gatlinburg, Tennessee.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Bank Barn Brawl
programme.desc: The builders head back to Brookville, Pennsylvania, to save the frame of a bank barn that sits dangerously close to a road. Then, Mark visits an old log lodge resort and scouts an amazing timber frame barn built in 1895.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Dairy Barn Danger
programme.desc: In Orwigsburg, Pennsylvania, the Barnwood Builders save one of the biggest barns they have ever seen. This dangerous demolition demands the best of everyone.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Restoration Week
programme.desc: The crew restores two cabins and builds a barn door for their blacksmith shop. Mark Bowe scouts an old log cabin and drives through a river to visit the fishing cabin he and his crew built two years ago.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Mark Bowe checks out some renovated grain silos and the craziest treehouse in town while the guys put a roof on their Texas timber frame. Mark's log cabin gets a Texas-style makeover, and he gets some help from his new neighbors, the Junk Gypsies.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Dairy Barn Danger
programme.desc: In Orwigsburg, Pennsylvania, the Barnwood Builders save one of the biggest barns they have ever seen. This dangerous demolition demands the best of everyone.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Rustic Farm Backyard
programme.desc: This backyard has gone to the chickens and these homeowners desperately want to co-exist with their little critters. Chris Lambton delivers with a design that includes an oversized chicken coop, water wheel, a 10-foot farm table and a rustic grill island.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging a House in Roanoke, VA, into Repurposed Housing Items
programme.desc: The entire Black Dog Salvage crew pitches in to help save parts of a house in Roanoke, VA. Main items include floors, trim, front porch columns, and a large built in cabinet. Back at the shop, Ted builds a fire pit and fountain from old syrup kettles.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Northeast Farmhouse
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the Black Dog Salvage crew save parts of an early 1800s farmhouse and barn in Edison, NJ. Key items include corner plinths, thick floorboards, and an elaborate front entryway. Mike also builds a daybed swing with spindles.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From Columbus, Ohio Into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: The guys tackle disassembling a 40 foot Eiffel Tower replica in Columbus. While there, they meet a fellow salvager and pick through his collection. Grayson also builds a floor lamp with salvaged materials back at the warehouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Hill Crest Bed and Breakfast
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the Black Dog Salvage crew extract a fireclay tub and window frame from a bed and breakfast. The crew also picks through a large auto graveyard. Key finds include a fire truck, a vintage cooler, and PBR sign.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lakeside Marina
programme.desc: The crew travel to Smith Mountain Lake to save parts off a sinking boat. While at the marina, they discover other boats on the property to salvage. At the warehouse, Mike builds a commissioned bar from wine barrels for a local winery.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items in Norfolk and Petersburg into Repurposed Goods.
programme.desc: The crew pays homage to their old red truck by turning it into a bench.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From a Foursquare Farmhouse in Roanoke, VA
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew take on a foursquare farmhouse in Roanoke, VA. Key items include colonnades, pocket doors, and a large front door. Back at the shop, Mike works on building a tailgater grill unit for a customer.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items in Roanoke, VA, Into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: At the warehouse, Mike builds a coffee table from a panel door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From an Old Navy Ship in Norfolk, VA, Into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the Black Dog Salvage crew salvage parts off a former navy ship, the USS Zuni/ USCG Tamaroa. Key finds include an officer's table, portholes, and wooden ship frames. At the warehouse, Mike builds a table from an airplane wing.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From an Apple Orchard into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew head into the mountains to salvage different structures of an old apple orchard. Key finds include roof tin, apple picking ladders, and apple crates. Robert also helps Ted build a commissioned iron gate.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Building Alaska, the New Generation
programme.desc: A new generation of builders tackles the Alaskan wilds to build off-the-grid cabins. First-time builder Nick faces some harsh realities when he can't use the trees on his build site for lumber. Brannon's team develops a unique foundation system.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Hard Work Beats Talent
programme.desc: Reality sets in for first-time extreme cabin builder Nick Blanco in Alaska as he fights the tides trying to retrieve pylons for his foundation. Brannon's team gets stuck on the muddy trail bringing in more build materials.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Noah's Barge
programme.desc: Jere, Ben and Tim put the finishing touches on the biggest project they've undertaken: building a 112-foot floating barge. They struggle with transporting it to the water, and hurricane-force winds change their plans.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Stuck in Shelikof
programme.desc: Nick experiences firsthand just how dangerous living in Alaska can be while hunting for driftwood to build his fishing lodge and warehouse. Jere and Ben's 112-foot barge starts its half-mile journey to the water.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain, Rain, Go Away
programme.desc: Rain and a muddy trail continue to slow down Brannon's cabin build, but despite their dampened spirits, the gang is able to haul the windows across the two-mile trail. Jere and Ben finally get the barge launched.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Rock 'n' Roll to Red River
programme.desc: Noah Cappe discovers that cheddar chimneys make him twist and shout at Burlington’s Sound of Music Festival and feels right at home at the Red River Valley Fair with the redneck taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hogs and Dogs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe sets sail for The Great Frederick Fair in Maryland, where he goes all in for The Whole Hog, finds his sea legs with The Crabby Dog, rounds out his plate with Cake-a-Dilla and dances for joy with the Hula Boat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Feast and Fries
programme.desc: At the Paris Fair in Ontario, Canada, Noah Cappe ponders a meat pie poutine. At the Washington County Fair in New York he taps into sugar shack cotton candy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Funnel Cakes and Fried Fudge
programme.desc: The York Fair in Pennsylvania has been drawing crowds since 1765, and has had 250 years to perfect its carnival eats! Noah decks the halls with a taste of Christmas, goes off on the burger bomb pretzel, and enjoys a fork free chick 'n' waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Clams and Cannoli
programme.desc: Mouthwatering midway munchies are on the menu at the Delaware County Fair in Walton, N.Y., where Noah Cappe goes wild for the spaghizza, packs on the pork with freshman 15 fries, snaps to attention for the veteran's clams n' corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Camp Pop
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to northern Indiana, where the Hoosiers in Valparaiso are doing things right at the Porter County Fair. The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together, the Elephant Ear Taco.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Antigua Guatemala
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the vibrant and flavorful fusions of Antigua Guatemala. This locale is home to sacred food traditions and cultural mashups of Mayan and Spanish heritage. His adventure includes colorful enchiladas, tiny tamales and traditional sweets.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius
programme.desc: From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavorful fusions of the island paradise of Mauritius.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew makes a trip to the coastal crossroads of the South Savannah, Georgia, where the food in influenced by rich culture.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: West Virginia
programme.desc: Andrew travels to West Virginia, where people are using methods both old and new to prepare wildlife that flourishes in the state's mountains and rivers.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Cranked Up Comfort

programme.title: Food Paradise: Bodacious Bowls
programme.desc: Diners take a break from the plate as they dig into super-stacked bowls across the country, from mac 'n' cheese flights of fancy and comforting pasta creations to bold beef stews and a chili with soul.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Besties Brunch

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Siesta Fiesta
programme.desc: Bobby may only have a few Spanish words in his repertoire, but when it comes to Spanish cuisine, he's a true aficionado.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch That Does a Body Good

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Deli-Icious Brunch

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hiro The Villain
programme.desc: Momakase blackmails Hiro into helping her steal her family's knives from Yama's safe.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Totally Awesome Battle Jack
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Infernal Internship of Mark Beaks
programme.desc: Huey competes with Dewey for a coveted internship with Duckburg's newest tech billionaire Mark Beaks, while Scrooge and Glomgold team up to take this annoying new competitor down.

programme.title: DuckTales: From the Confidential Casefiles of Agent 22!
programme.desc: Scrooge contends with stowaway Webby during a covert operation to rescue Beakley.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year

programme.title: DuckTales: Terror of the Terra-firmians
programme.desc: Huey and Webby explore an abandoned subway tunnel to prove the existence of an underground species, while Mrs. Beakley grows suspicious of Lena’s potentially corrupting influence.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Bring on the Bad Guys: Part Four
programme.desc: Spidey tracks the identity of the mysterious boss that put a price on his head and who has been sending villains after him.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Hiro gets set up with 14-year-old Megan, leading him to wonder if he's missing out on a normal life. The team must deal with an upgraded High Voltage.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: All-In! Judgement Joker!

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Four: 1969-1979
programme.desc: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Five: 1980-1989
programme.desc: The 1980s begin with Herschel Walker leading Georgia to a national title as a freshman. After Bear Bryant retires in 1982 and passes away four weeks later, control of the SEC is eventually transferred to Pat Dye and Bo Jackson at Auburn.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Six: 1990-1999
programme.desc: The 1990s bring change with expansion and the sport's first-ever conference championship game. Florida's Steve Spurrier fashions an era of high-octane offense, and his Gators form a rivalry with Tennessee and quarterback Peyton Manning.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Seven: 2000-2009
programme.desc: Nick Saban comes to LSU in 2000 and eventually wins the Tigers' first national championship since 1958 - a feat matched by Les Miles. At Florida, Tim Tebow becomes a cult hero and wins two national titles with Urban Meyer's Gators.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Eight: 2010-2019
programme.desc: The SEC has a run of seven straight national titles, and nine in 12 years. Expansion in 2012 gives the conference 14 schools. Meanwhile, Nick Saban arguably becomes the greatest coach in the history of college football.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Fate of Danger: Part I

programme.title: The Substitute: Cooper Barnes

programme.title: Friends: The One With Five Steaks and An Eggplant

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Baby on the Bus

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Lesbian Wedding
programme.desc: The gang attends the wedding of Ross's ex-wife where Monica is the caterer.

programme.title: Friends: The One After the Super Bowl

programme.title: Friends: The One After the Super Bowl

programme.desc: Monica is attracted to an old family friend. Ross and Rachel have their first date.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Joey Moves Out

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Flea in Her Dome/ Donut of Shame

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Sea Patrol: Pups Save Puplantis

programme.title: The First 48: School Ties/ Friend or Foe

programme.title: The First 48: Blood Red/ Deadly Moves

programme.title: The First 48: Blood Lust

programme.title: The First 48: Love Hate/ A Soldier's Life

programme.title: The First 48: Dangerous Company
programme.desc: A father gone missing turns up dead when his plans to evict a tenant ignite a murderous rage.

programme.title: The First 48: Million Dollar Question

programme.title: The First 48: Easy Money/ Ambushed
programme.desc: Young father shot in the back in Dallas, but no one wants to talk; later in Cleveland, brazen corner store stickup leaves innocent clerk dead.

programme.title: The First 48: Lost Boys
programme.desc: After a grandmother is gunned down just steps from her front door, Det. John Brown discovers that her killers may be 14-year-old boys.

programme.title: The First 48: Cold Betrayal
programme.desc: In Cleveland, a man is gunned down at home in front of his family just a few days before Christmas. Dets. Tom Armelli and Bob Ford must delve into the dangerous business of drug dealing to hunt down the killers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Training Day
programme.desc: The guys go to a supermarket with bells on and try to reminisce with strangers in the park. Plus, tonight's three losers are put through an epic trial by fire.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Worst. Hot Sauce. Ever
programme.desc: Two comic book guys go against two twerkin' besties. The 'Constrictor Sauce' knocks the comic book guys to their knees, but the keep fighting for the prize.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: No Sugar, Tons of Spice
programme.desc: Two teams duke it out against the catastrophic concoctions from Chef Willie.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: A Hot Mess
programme.desc: Fiery identical twins take on saucy drag queens in the Pepperdome. It's duke it out or puke it out in this episode where one player becomes very intimate with the Hot Ones' spit bucket.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Beware the Bucket
programme.desc: Two teams of best friends enter the Pepperdome with confidence, but Chef Willie's demonic sauces bring them down hard and early.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: All Aboard!
programme.desc: For every hilarious, awkward and uncomfortable moment featured in episodes of Impractical Jokers, there are plenty of other great moments that end up on the cutting room floor. The guys share never-before-seen footage from seasons past.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: A Day in the Life
programme.desc: A documentary crew gets access to the cast and crew of the popular hidden camera series. This inside look unveils things like how the show is made, what it's like to be the Jokers, as well as what happens when the guys reveal marks are on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.desc: The guys try to justify getting humiliated at a convenience store, they give conflicting info about their event planning companies at a wedding expo and the loser awkwardly meets his celebrity childhood crush: Danica McKellar.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Beware the Bucket
programme.desc: Two teams of best friends enter the Pepperdome with confidence, but Chef Willie's demonic sauces bring them down hard and early.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: No Sugar, Tons of Spice

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies

programme.desc: A young millennial's recent home improvement projects have made it hard for her to sell her condo. Twins Leslie and Lyndsay transform her DIY disaster into a hip, modern home, perfect for a first-time home buyer.

programme.desc: A couple is moving out of state for work and needs Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell their home. The twins revamp their outdated ranch with a modern farmhouse style designed to reel in buyers who love to entertain.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rental Property Reno
programme.desc: A contractor is desperate to sell his rental property that's a real wreck. When he's tempted to overspend on the renovation, twins Leslie and Lyndsay help steer Jeff toward a more budget-friendly makeover with an eclectic style.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Starter Home Transformation

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Watches, Waistcoats and Wizards

programme.title: American Pickers: Cruisin'
programme.desc: Mike and Dave explore a former Minnesota car dealership that is now home to scores of dusty projects and a miniature cruise ship.

programme.title: UFO Files: Real UFOs
programme.desc: Ever since the military started using sophisticated airplanes, they have sought ways to build an aircraft that can fly undetected, manoeuvre like a helicopter and fly like a jet. The Nazis first pursued the idea of a disc-shaped aircraft.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: Nazi Time Travelers
programme.desc: At the height of World War II, the Nazis engaged their top scientists to develop 'wonder weapons' among them 'Die Glocke' believed to be a time travel device. Giorgio travels from Poland to Pennsylvania on the trail of this wonder weapon.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Founding of America
programme.desc: It is evident that Washington, D.C was inspired by the ancient world. There are Greek pillars, Roman domes and other clear examples of this. Ancient astronaut theorist Giorgio A. Tsoukalos believes there may have been otherworldly influences.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Mystery of Puma Punku
programme.desc: The ancient ruins of Puma Punku have mystified archaeologists ever since their discovery hundreds of years ago. The massive stones are precisely carved into blocks that are unlike anything found anywhere else in the world.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Mystery of Nazca
programme.desc: Nazca remains one of the most mysterious sites on Earth. The desert floor is covered in geoglyphs that can only be gully viewed from the sky, the mountains appear to have had their peaks sliced off and a band of man-sized holes stretches for two miles.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Alien Code
programme.desc: Ancient Astronaut Theory has existed in popular culture for nearly 50 years, asking the question whether extraterrestrials visited Earth in the remote past. There are examples of physical evidence all around the world that suggests humans are not alone.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Mystery of the Cyclops
programme.desc: The mystery of the Mediterranean island of Malta lies south of Sicily and is home to megalithic structures. The massive blocks pre-date the Great Pyramid of Giza.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: Searching for Bigfoot
programme.desc: Many reported sightings of big, hairy monsters in America are also accompanied by accounts of UFO activity and unexplained lights in the sky. If the creature known as Bigfoot really exists, it could be living proof that extraterrestrials have been here.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Mystery of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Giorgio Tsoukalos travels from the Highlands of Scotland to the shores of Vermont's Lake Champlain in his quest to learn more about these elusive lake monsters.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Roswell Rock
programme.desc: A mysterious rock was discovered in Roswell, New Mexico in 2004. Now called 'The Roswell Rock, this unusually smooth stone possess unique magnetic properties.

programme.title: Movie: The Master of Ballantrae
programme.desc: The story of a former rebel fighter who becomes a wealthy pirate.

programme.title: Movie: China Seas
programme.desc: A sea captain tries to turn over a new leaf when he becomes attached to a high-class English lady. When pirates invade his ship, he learns that a former girlfriend may be connected to the crime.

programme.title: Movie: Captain Blood
programme.desc: A physician is condemned to slavery in Jamaica, where he treats people and falls in love.

programme.title: Movie: The Sea Hawk
programme.desc: A privateer attacks Spanish vessels and romances the Spanish ambassador's daughter.

programme.title: Movie: Mutiny on the Bounty

programme.title: Movie: The Crimson Pirate

programme.title: Movie: The Boy and the Pirates
programme.desc: A boy's granted wish for a spell on Blackbeard's pirate ship is very exciting.

programme.title: Movie: The Fighting 69th

programme.title: Movie: Peg O' My Heart

programme.desc: After Tony's identity is stolen by multiple perpetrators, the fake Special Agent DiNozzos begin blackmailing Senators.

programme.title: NCIS: Return to Sender
programme.desc: Gibbs and Senior FBI Agent T.C. Fornell unite after two British prisoners, including a former spy, escape and arrive stateside via a shipping container. Also, McGee is busy apartment hunting and determined to find out how DiNozzo bought his lavish place.

programme.title: NCIS: Homefront
programme.desc: When a 14-year-old foils a home invasion, Gibbs suspects the teenager is withholding pertinent details. Also, Director Vance and Senior FBI Agent Fornell travel to London as part of the ongoing escaped British spy case.

programme.title: NCIS: Dead Letter
programme.desc: The NCIS team, alongside the FBI and MI6, continue an international manhunt for an escaped British spy who has left one colleague fighting for their life in ICU.

programme.title: NCIS: Family First

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: In a Duffle Bag

programme.title: How the Universe Works: First Second of the Big Bang
programme.desc: The first second of the Universe, the creation of everything when space, time, matter and energy burst into existence. It is the most important second in history, which seals the Universe's fate and defines everything that comes after - including us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Megaflares
programme.desc: The universe is expanding and so is our understanding of it. Get up-to-date information on mega flares. The sun spits out flares capable of battering life on Earth, but out there in space lay the true magnetic monsters.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: First Second of the Big Bang
programme.desc: The first second of the Universe, the creation of everything when space, time, matter and energy burst into existence. It is the most important second in history, which seals the Universe's fate and defines everything that comes after - including us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When Supernovas Strike
programme.desc: Supernovas are the violent death of giant stars, and new discoveries reveal that these cataclysmic events create the elements that are essential to all life in the universe.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Message
programme.desc: Take a look at what might really happen if we got a message from space. Scientists and sci-fi writers, with cooperation from SETI and Carl Sagan's son, Nick, unravel the impact of this world changing event.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Arrival
programme.desc: Take a look at how humans may react when an alien spacecraft makes its way to Earth.

programme.title: Aliens: The Definitive Guide: What to Expect
programme.desc: Aliens exist. Scientists lay out what we can expect them to be like by grappling with difficult questions.

programme.title: Aliens: The Definitive Guide: How to Prepare
programme.desc: Inject a dose of cutting-edge research into an action-packed journey through space, to find out exactly whether aliens might come here, and how to prepare when they arrive.This everything you need to know; it's the definitive guide.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT

programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Brothels
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind one of society's most clandestine institutions: brothels. Hidden within these bordellos are secrets about famous patrons, governments, and even religion.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Bunkers
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind America's secret bunkers. Ranging from backyard boxes to government mini-cities. Underground bunkers have been a feature of warfare planning since the dawn of time and have played an important role in America's history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Honey Bucket
programme.desc: Nick races to finish his cabin before his mom visits again. Bears are still a threat, so Nick makes sure the electric fence is working. Nick and Kent design and build a "honey bucket," also known as an Alaskan toilet.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Home Stretch
programme.desc: All the builders are in the home stretch in Alaska as they try to finish their cabins. Jere and Ben install interior and exterior siding. Nick's roof is dried in, so he turns to finishing the sleeping loft.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Grand Finale
programme.desc: Nick's dad, Paul, returns to help put the finishing touches on the cabin. Brannon's team builds countertops and railings for the cabin, and his client arrives. Jere and Ben put in hard work finishing the new Sea Otter Sound Lodge.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ship-shape Shack
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full transforming a family's treasured 1950s lobster shack into a cabin that will create a lifetime of memories for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Saulter
programme.desc: After relocating back to Maine, a family of five has been cramped in their small cabin on a peninsula overlooking Great Pond. Chase and the team want to expand the footprint of their home, but they must work fast to finish the restoration before winter.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Saulter
programme.desc: After relocating back to Maine, a family of five has been cramped in their small cabin on a peninsula overlooking Great Pond. Chase and the team want to expand the footprint of their home, but they must work fast to finish the restoration before winter.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Not So Tiny House
programme.desc: After being diagnosed with epilepsy, a woman is ready for more independence and her master craftsman father is harnessing his talents to build her a unique tiny home that expands.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: City Girl Meets Country Tiny
programme.desc: A career cheerleader wants a rustic-chic country tiny home that can be her escape. This tiny house includes a main floor master bedroom. It is placed on a farm with horses, a zip line and other adventures just steps away from the front door.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Athlete's Tiny Training Home
programme.desc: A young outdoorsy couple follows their dream of becoming homeowners with no problems downsizing. This Colorado abode will include locally-sourced beetle kill pine and a slick hidden dog food feeder for their three pups.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Tiny Shoebox House
programme.desc: An Idaho couple creates an amazing three-level tiny home. She wants a pampered paradise, but he prefers a rustic escape. This tiny house has it all including vintage accessories, an upscale master bedroom with skylight and even an outdoor movie theater.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Charlestonian Dream 'Tiny'
programme.desc: A family of four brings the unique character of Charleston, South Carolina into their tiny house build. They include traditional touches on the outside like a shell stone path, and the Southern charm flows indoors with wood countertops and a sitting area.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Off-Grid Tiny
programme.desc: A family of five builds a charming off-grid tiny house on 20 acres in northern Idaho. The family all pitch in helping to build a wood cook stove, a fireplace, an open kitchen and custom wood countertops. The off-grid adventure also continues outside.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Tiny Upcycled Island Home
programme.desc: A cruise-ship bartender gets help to build a tiny house to park on her parents' San Juan Island property. Her design includes recycled materials from her dad's collection. The 328 square foot design is sure to feel huge compared to a ship's cabin.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Southern Charm Tiny House
programme.desc: A young couple that exudes southern charm enlists the help of their aunt and uncle to build a gorgeous tiny farmhouse. The rustic home features reclaimed wood, a custom bathtub, a pull-out dog bowl and a front porch for entertaining.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Tiny Yoga House
programme.desc: A mom and daughter in Texas mix business with pleasure as they build a tiny home that doubles as a yoga studio. They infuse a lot of Zen into this design with aerial hammocks, monkey bars, yoga mat flooring and a fold-down kitchen table.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Tiny Man Cave
programme.desc: Mike wants to live a more simple life to become a farmer. He entrusts three builders to create a high-end tiny man cave that includes rain-sensing skylights and a surprise garage under the gooseneck for Mike's motorcycle.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: New Parents' Tiny Nest
programme.desc: It's a race to the finish as an expectant Idaho couple adds a nursery to their tiny house blueprints. With help from family, they set out to create a sleek, modern tiny home with all the functionality new parents need. This couple hopes to finish quickly.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Tall Man Tiny House
programme.desc: Tiny house owners try to make every inch count, but for 6-foot-7-inch tall Clay, it's a must! His home needs to fit his huge frame, so many designs are being replaced with custom elements. Windows will be larger and higher and his bed will fold up.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Rural Retreat Historical Society
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the team travel to the Rural Retreat Historical Society in Rural Retreat, Virginia. Mike sets up rigging from the rooftop for an outdoor clock while Robert salvages a vault door and bank teller station.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Grace Family Church
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew travels to Vinton, Virginia, in order to salvage a massive piece of stained glass from the Grace Family Church. They run into challenges when equipment is delayed.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Marion Bowling Alley
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to Marion, Virginia, to salvage a soon-to-be renovated bowling alley. However, the bowling alley floor turns out to be far heavier than they anticipated.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Texas Tavern Sign
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs work at home in Roanoke, Virginia, where they salvage a sign for the Texas Tavern and learn the history of the local restaurant over burgers and bowls of chili.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Agatha's Catholic Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to snowy Ellwood City, Pennsylvania, to reclaim pieces of St. Agatha's Catholic Church. In the bitterly cold weather, they salvage stained glass, spiral ducting and lights.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Noland Sign Company
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage team works in Roanoke, Virginia, at the Noland Sign Company. On a windy day, they salvage metal lettering, copper cupolas and vintage plumbing.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Agatha's Church Rectory
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage team heads back to snowy Ellwood City, Pennsylvania, to salvage the rectory of St. Agatha's Catholic Church. Robert, Mike and the crew brave snow and ice to salvage a triple sink, glass blocks and storm door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Trinity Lutheran Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Greencastle, PA, to salvage an old church that is being restored for a physical therapy office. The team struggles to figure out the best way to remove the windows, salvage the large bell and execute an idea for a console.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pretzel-a, Queen of Dessert
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Crystal River, Florida, for the Florida Manatee Festival, where he tries the OMG Pretzel Bomb and the Fried King Cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gordita, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the jackpot with midway eats, like the onion ring nacho supreme and cosmic funnel cake, at the Pasco County Fair in Florida. Later, he decks the halls and grabs a bite or two at the sights and sounds of Christmas in San Marcos, Texas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb lands in Worcester, MA, where he slurps down some radical ramen, indulges in peanut butter cup French toast and takes on a rack of deep-fried ribs with the heat of a million Scoville units.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Baltimore, MD
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epic eating expedition brings him to Baltimore for an out-of-this-world diner, a classic crab feast and a four-pound pho fight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: In the Last Place You'd Expect
programme.desc: Sometimes the best dishes are in the last place you'd ever expect to find them. We've scoured the globe, searched far and wide, and the hunt stops here. Alex Guarnaschelli ends the debate over where to find the best bagel -- it's in North Yarmouth, Maine!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Alton Brown talks up his favorite beef Wellington, while Jamika Pessoa melts over buttery biscuits.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics X: Chicken Parm
programme.desc: Alton Brown makes the argument that Italian food was actually invented in America, and that chicken parmesan is the dish where it all began. Yet, an Italian canned tomato makes it all possible.

programme.title: Good Eats: Use Your Noodle 4: Lasagna
programme.desc: Learn how to make lasagna, the number one comfort food.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fry Hard III: Fry, Tempura, Fry!
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes on the most mythic, magical, but often times monstrous form of frying known to modern man.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Catfish Will Rise Again
programme.desc: Alton Brown sets out to modernize the image of the catfish.

programme.desc: Schwoz accidentally morphs Charlotte into half girl/ half octopus, Captain Man and Kid Danger work to change her back but first they must catch her. The group's vacation is cut short when Jasper falls into a volcano and is held captive by the Volcaniacs.

programme.title: It's Pony: Delivery Pony/ Magic Annie
programme.desc: Annie and Pony's new fruit and vegetable delivery service is threatened by a big corporation. Annie needs to find the perfect Mother's Day gift. Pony is convinced that Annie's magic trick is just the thing.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Fate of Danger: Part I
programme.desc: Kid Danger and friends try to get Captain Man back from the past as Drex continues his scheme to erase Swellview's memory of Captain Man forever.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SquarePants Family Vacation
programme.desc: While on a family road trip to the Great Barrier Reef, SpongeBob and Patrick get lost and end up on the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mooncation/ Mr. Krabs Takes a Vacation
programme.desc: SpongeBob house-sits for Sandy, and all is quiet until Patrick shows up. After losing their passes, SpongeBob and Squidward try to sneak backstage at the sold-out Kelpy G show.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: House Sittin' for Sandy/ Smoothe Jazz at Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: All is quiet while SpongeBob is house-sitting for Sandy - until Patrick shows up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krabby Patty That Ate Bikini Bottom / Bubble Buddy Returns
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs uses Sandy's experimental growth formula on a Krabby Patty and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squiditis/ Demolition Doofus
programme.desc: Gary will do anything to get the new treats SpongeBob brings home. Mr. Puff enters SpongeBob in the demolition derby.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Good Krabby Name/ Move It or Lose It
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick advertise the Krusty Krab. Then, petitions are circulated to see which restaurant will get bulldozed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Friendly Game/ Sentimental Sponge
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build an indoor miniature golf course in SpongeBob's house. SpongeBob has trouble throwing anything away when he realizes how many memories are attached to all his possessions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Extreme Sports/ Squirrel Record
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join the extreme sports team the Drasticals. Also, Sandy finds a book of world's records and tries to break them all with SpongeBob's help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Kenny the Cat
programme.desc: SpongeBob will do anything to get to meet his newest hero, Kenny the Cat.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It Came From Goo Lagoon
programme.desc: A giant goo bubble emerges from Goo Lagoon and threatens all of Bikini Bottom. Plankton plans to use the bubble for his own evil ends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Kenny the Cat/ Yeti Crabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob will do anything to get to meet his newest hero, Kenny the Cat.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down

programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muirahara Woods

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.desc: Fred's invisibility function on his suit glitches during patrol.
