programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Portrait of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer terrorizes a small Texas town.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ambush
programme.desc: A mysterious murder in an upscale community is solved by cell phone forensics.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Forensic experts and investigators piece together strange clues and microscopic evidence to solve the most puzzling criminal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Forensic experts and investigators piece together strange clues and microscopic evidence to solve the most puzzling criminal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.desc: Recently-divorced mom Ingrid Lyne dips her toes back into the dating scene and meets a man online. But her date at a baseball game would be her last. The next day investigators are shocked by a chilling crime scene.

programme.title: On the Story

programme.title: True Crime Live
programme.desc: Mike Galanos puts a spotlight on news and developments in criminal investigations.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rolling Down the Mountain
programme.desc: A young outlaw with an old pot still earns an apprenticeship with Mark and Digger. Mountain man Mark tackles a week-long run to hit an $18K order that includes special delivery. In a desperate attempt to fix his worm barrel, Josh dives in headfirst.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hemp Shine
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws infuse anxiety-reducing CBD into their shine but the science is anything but stress-free. Josh digs into his secret stash to cure his subterranean blues. A mystery bootlegger dominates Mike's turf and it's about to get incendiary.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Georgia on My Shine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger head down to Georgia and uncover 'Elvis,' Popcorn Sutton's most prolific still. Mike plots payback after discovering a rival's liquor stealing his customers. Tim and Tickle are torn over what to do with their new backwoods shine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Unexpected Offer
programme.desc: With Extra Shine and bonus scenes: A new bootlegger in town makes Mark and Digger an offer they can't refuse. Mike and Jerry confront Daniel about his invasion of their territory. Tickle, Henry and Kenny expand their CBD-infused moonshine operation.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Best Served Cold
programme.desc: In the season finale, Tickle gets a life sentence to the marvelous Mrs. Tickle. Mark and Digger risk delivering both moonshine and justice. Josh smashes obstacles standing in his way all season. Distillers dig deep to make the moonshine of Mexico.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Mark Rogers: Last of the Mountain Men
programme.desc: Mark Rogers has lived off the land, surviving in today's world by hunting, fishing and making liquor. Mark heads into the mountains of Appalachia to track a black bear and also to dig ginseng, a rare medicinal root that he wants to infuse with moonshine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Best Served Cold
programme.desc: In the season finale, Tickle gets a life sentence to the marvelous Mrs. Tickle. Mark and Digger risk delivering both moonshine and justice. Josh smashes obstacles standing in his way all season. Distillers dig deep to make the moonshine of Mexico.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Gone A-Rye
programme.desc: Shiners attempt to stay off the grid as the outside world encroaches on the backwoods. Tim breaks the news about the fate of Climax Moonshine. Jeff, Mark and Lance search for a new site before rivals can grab hold of the market.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Still Life
programme.desc: Josh and Bill find themselves with no still, no home base and no shine. Mark and Digger enlist a whiskey legend to find out why their first run went awry. Mark, Jeff and Lance undertake construction on an ambitious still site.

programme.title: Inside the FBI
programme.desc: Agents from the San Diego FBI office share details of ongoing cases including a Mexican Mafia takedown and a drug cartel mass murder.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: American Whiskey
programme.desc: Heritage grains meet charred oak as three amateur distillers compete to make the best American Whiskey. Judged by Mark, Digger and Tim, they'll go head to head in a series of challenges to determine who has what it takes to be Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Rum Conundrum
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as legal and outlaw distillers compete to make the best rum. Constructing stills of their own design and mashing in their own raw ingredients, only one will survive elimination to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Moonshine of Mexico
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as top amateur distillers from both sides of the law compete to make mezcal, the moonshine of Mexico. Using agave mash, regional recipes and even meat, only one competitor will earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Leather Tanner
programme.desc: Mike steps back in time when he joins Richard Meyers and his sons in the ancient art of tanning leather. At their tannery in New York Mike rolls up his sleeves and gets dirty turning stiff cowhides into soft suede soles for bowling shoes.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bridge Painter
programme.desc: Mike Rowe and the Dirty Jobs crew travels to Michigan to work with the Mackinac Bridge Authority on one of the world's largest suspension bridges. Mike goes to great lengths and heights, braving 50 mile per hour winds while helping paint the bridge.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lasseter's Gold
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets off deep into the Australian Outback, following the footsteps of legendary explorer Harold Lasseter, who claims to have found a vast field of gold. Josh follows the clues that ultimately lead to a breathtaking conclusion.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mystery in Mammoth Cave
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot investigate a strange phenomenon that's been haunting Mammoth Cave for generations.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mothman Phenomenon
programme.desc: Jessica Chobot and Phil Torres dive into the legend of Mothman by searching for clues in a long-sealed bunker and a top-secret Air Force base.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mt. Adams' UFO Encounter
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot follow headlines of hidden hangars and strange orbs of light into an active volcano in Washington.

programme.title: Rob Riggle: Global Investigator: The Holiest of Grails
programme.desc: Finding the actual Holy Grail is the holy grail for all global investigators, so Rob's on the case. He's following in the footsteps of the Knights Templars and unearthing new evidence that could prove the grail has been hidden in Scotland all this time.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: World's 8th Wonder
programme.desc: Josh is on the trail from Russia to Germany in search of history's most expensive stolen object, the Amber Chamber. Retracing the steps of Nazi soldiers, Josh explores abandoned Nazi bunkers and a hazardous German mine.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sister Act!
programme.desc: Samantha is a triplet whose opinionated sisters want to make the final dress decision! Sisters Jessica and Kristen shop together to find they have surprisingly similar tastes. Amy opted for a more modest dress, but is having second thoughts.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: What Does Martha Think?
programme.desc: The wedding guru herself, Martha Stewart, visits Kleinfeld. She's helping bride Bailey decide if she truly chose her perfect dress. Meanwhile, bride Jessica is so indecisive she may not find a gown, and Crystal wants impossible alterations.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Situation in the Salon
programme.desc: Mike 'The Situation' Sorrentino arrives at Kleinfeld to help younger sister Melissa find her wedding gown, but he and his brothers keep stealing her spotlight. Meanwhile, bride-to-be Ashley is upstaged by her flower girl's custom-made Pnina dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Vision Confusion
programme.desc: Lauren wants to look like a 'classy porn star' at her wedding, but she's in for a surprise. Bride Cheryl only knows what she does not want her wedding dress to look like. Bride Amanda hopes her custom gown lives up to the vision in her mind.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Worth the Weight
programme.desc: When Whitney and Todd hatch an exciting new business plan, Ryan's negative reaction threatens to derail not only their upcoming trip to Paris but also Whitney's performance at the North Carolina State Weightlifting Championships.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: A Fat Girl in Paris
programme.desc: The trip to Paris is underway and expectations are high, but Whitney worries when she and Ryan clash over their opposing business plans. Meanwhile, Whitney finally warms up to talk to Chase about their future, but his reaction leaves her cold.

programme.title: I Am Jazz: Somewhere Over the Rainbow

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Nature's Super HQ

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild - Fearless: Into the Anaconda's Den

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild - Fearless: Constricted by a Colossal Python
programme.desc: As night falls on the arid Outback, Coyote and his crew set out in search of the continent's non-venomous snake group, pythons. He encounters one of these nocturnal constrictors in action and he must use all his energy against its immense power.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Night of the Geckos
programme.desc: In the Outback, Coyote and his crew set out to find three iconic gecko species. As night falls, Coyote begins his search to examine the nocturnal insect predators, and encounters the rare knob-tailed gecko, camouflaged by its rock-like appearance.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Urban Dragons
programme.desc: Coyote and his crew head to Australia's wilderness seeking different species of dragons. There, his biggest challenge is finding each creature in order to determine how they have managed to cohabitate with humans.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Pete's Most Memorable Builds

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Branched Out: Shaq's Slam Dunk Hideaway
programme.desc: The sky's the limit when Pete helps basketball legend Shaquille O'Neal build his dream speakeasy hideaway. Later, Pete heads to Alabama to design a spy's ultimate getaway when he designs an espionage-themed treehouse.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Urban Dragons

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Branched Out: Shaq's Slam Dunk Hideaway
programme.desc: The sky's the limit when Pete helps basketball legend Shaquille O'Neal build his dream speakeasy hideaway. Later, Pete heads to Alabama to design a spy's ultimate getaway when he designs an espionage-themed treehouse.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Night of the Geckos
programme.desc: In the Outback, Coyote and his crew set out to find three iconic gecko species. As night falls, Coyote begins his search to examine the nocturnal insect predators, and encounters the rare knob-tailed gecko, camouflaged by its rock-like appearance.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Urban Dragons
programme.desc: Coyote and his crew head to Australia's wilderness seeking different species of dragons. There, his biggest challenge is finding each creature in order to determine how they have managed to cohabitate with humans.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Pete's Most Memorable Builds

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Big Croc Diaries: Special Edition
programme.desc: Steve introduces his favourite crocodiles at Australia Zoo.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Mighty Munchkins

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: On the War Path
programme.desc: A female cat named Larry with disturbing bouts of aggression threatens to keep Josh and Tara from getting married.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Saved by the Sky
programme.desc: A puppy with a broken leg is rescued from a kill shelter in Oklahoma and flown to Denver where Dr. Jeff gives her a second chance at life. A dog eats a box of toxic chocolates infused with marijuana and is rushed to the clinic for treatment.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Cat vs. Robot
programme.desc: Dr. Blue quarantines a dog who may be suffering with the flu, while Dr. Ross treats a wobbly boxer whose limbs never fully formed. Dr. Lavigne thinks a robot vacuum is to blame for a stressed-out cat and performs emergency surgery to save a puppy's life.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Road Trip Rescue
programme.desc: Carrying three baby kangaroos and an emu, the Irwins caravan into the Australian Outback to release the animals on Mourachan, their giant wildlife conservation property. Plans shift when they discover more animals in need of rescue along the way.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Territorial Chimps

programme.title: The Zoo: Baby Bunnies, Big World
programme.desc: Crate training Nikita the Amur tiger in preparation for her move to Washington, DC proves challenging. An endangered Chinese alligator shows signs of being pregnant. Plus, staff prepare to release rare New England cottontail rabbits into the wild.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Pressure Cooker
programme.desc: Villalobos faces one of their most challenging rescues when a house fire reveals a massive dog-hoarding situation. Two teachers fall in love with a deaf puppy they hope to give a forever home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Fire Dog
programme.desc: A potential best friend needs to pass a unique test before he can be adopted out. Parolee Jammall returns after a mysterious absence. A year after losing their house in a fire, M2 and Kanani do something special for the dog who saved their lives.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: New Blood
programme.desc: Two new rookies from the 59th cadet class of Texas Game Wardens work their first cases. Game wardens rescue softshell turtles caught on illegal trotlines on Llano River. In East Texas, the search is on for a hunter lost in the Big Thicket Preserve.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Looking Out for Stateville
programme.desc: Voight convinces Deputy Crowley to bring in his former cellmate, Eddie, as a CI for the unit in order to help bring down a big-time cocaine supplier and his local dealers.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Hit Me
programme.desc: Lindsay goes undercover in an effort to track down a rogue police officer targeting women leaving a local casino.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Song of Gregory William Yates
programme.desc: Gregory Yates escapes from prison and the team learns he intends to flee to New York. The SVU team informs Intelligence that he has been gathering information on Lindsay.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Night Owl
programme.desc: While working at a sobriety checkpoint, Burgess finds a duffle bag full of heroin in the truck of a respected college professor who claims to know nothing about how the drugs ended up there.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Cases That Need to Be Solved
programme.desc: When a young boy is executed, Intelligence turns to the boy's parents for information. Upon further investigation, they discover the boy's father has a criminal background and was part of a local gang.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forty-Caliber Bread Crumb
programme.desc: While out on a bank run for his off-duty security job, Halstead and his co-workers find themselves under attack by a violent robbery crew which quickly becomes a full-scale shoot-out.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Kasual With a K
programme.desc: While responding to a call of shots fired, Voight, Antonio and Halstead come across a secret battered women's shelter and discover the owner has been wounded.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: If We Were Normal
programme.desc: When a call comes in about a woman stabbing a man then fleeing the scene, Burgess and Lindsay go investigate and find a young woman with the weapon in her hand.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: In a Duffle Bag
programme.desc: Voight responds to a call about a suspicious duffle bag, and uncovers a frigid newborn baby. Determined to find the culprit who abandoned the infant, Intelligence receives a promising lead based on information provided by Chicago Med.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Battle Scars
programme.desc: Hetty's former Vietnam War colleagues partner with the NCIS team after a former navy commander kidnaps a corrupt Veterans Affairs administrator who has been siphoning funds.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Conspiracy
programme.desc: When family man Jack Jesse is murdered in his Orange County home, police can't pin down any suspects. It is not until a dedicated detective, a story told at a bar, and a police made mouse trap are all put together that the perpetrators are finally caught.

programme.title: Snapped: Lynette Pontius
programme.desc: Lynette flees the country when her ex-boyfriend is shot during a custody dispute, but finding her is only one of the challenges investigators have to face.

programme.title: Snapped: Suzanne Schoff
programme.desc: Suzanne’s marriage comes to an end when she and Frank’s best friend begin a scandalous love affair. After Frank is gunned down, police discover a sick plot of lies and manipulation centered on their ongoing custody battle.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Detour
programme.desc: Diane McIver was a successful businesswoman who enjoyed a lavish lifestyle with her husband. Then she was gone. It was a mystery riddled with privilege and power, but investigators needed to answer a crucial question: was this an accident or murder?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: A couple's romantic boat trip turns tragic when a young wife is lost at sea. The case was cold for years until a model with a checkered past goes undercover to find the truth.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: After a night shift, an Indiana college student heads home. Hours later, and a mile away, her car is found abandoned. And when two horrifying discoveries are soon made, investigators wonder if they're dealing with a small town serial killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Acting On Evil
programme.desc: After a Wisconsin cast party, a mother makes an unimaginable discovery. Suddenly, a close circle of friends is under suspicion for murder. As detectives work quickly to unravel this mystery, another vicious attack may lead them to their killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Smokey Mountain Murders
programme.desc: It's quitting time in the Smokey Mountains of Tennessee and a group of fellas bellies up to a local bar. But when moods shift, someone will wind up dead. And when another local mysteriously goes missing, neighbors fear a killer is hiding among them.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: During a cold Minneapolis winter, a night out with good friends takes a dark turn when one of them disappears. Days later, when human remains are discovered, investigators travel a chilling path to catch a killer before another night ends in murder.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: When a beautiful garden turns into a dark abyss, the serenity in Salem, Oregon is shattered. All is not as it seems as investigators dig into the life of a single mom. As the grisly details begin to unfold, the chase is on to catch a killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Fatal Mistake
programme.desc: A bizarre trail from South Dakota to Minnesota ends in a dark discovery and a case gone cold. While investigators question whether a man of God is the key to solving this mystery, they fear blind faith is not only risky, but could prove to be deadly.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: A deadly mystery with deep running roots snakes through a small Alabama town, shattering a young family and baffling the community. Investigators unlock long held Southern secrets to solve a murder and discover a truth steeped in blood and revenge.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Last Call
programme.desc: An unsuspecting field worker makes a horrifying discovery in a backyard orchard and detectives chase down deadly clues. But when a savage killer slips through the cracks, innocent lives are threatened and solving this case is suddenly in jeopardy.

programme.title: Snapped: Monique Berkley
programme.desc: Monique Berkley's sailor husband survived a year of active duty in the Persian Gulf, but he didn't survive three days at home. Police claim Monique welcomed him back by having her teenaged lover shoot and stab him to death.

programme.title: Movie: The Great Wall
programme.desc: A mercenary warrior is imprisoned in The Great Wall and discovers that it is the only barrier keeping humans safe from a horde of monsters. He joins up with a group of elite warriors and, together, they fight the unstoppable force to save the world.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer vs. the 18th Amendment

programme.title: The Simpsons: In the Name of the Grandfather

programme.desc: The biggest, most advanced fireboats in the world carry superhero behemoths, using cutting-edge engineering and technology to keep a critical American port safe from deadly fires.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Giants: Titans of Power
programme.desc: The world's biggest tidal turbine is a cutting-edge machine that can revolutionize the energy industry, but first, a crew of engineers must use the latest tech to battle dangerous tides and successfully install it.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Giants: US Navy Super Fleet
programme.desc: The world's toughest naval fleet are put to the test as cutting-edge aircraft carriers, combat ships, and amphibious assault vehicles and their crews undergo challenging warfare exercises.

programme.title: Female Forces: Irish Luck
programme.desc: St. Patrick's Day evening is the perfect backdrop as zany suspects take center stage, including a belligerent drunk woman who continuously bangs her head in an attempt to cause herself bodily harm.

programme.title: Female Forces: Crash Makeover
programme.desc: Betsy and Officer Julie Lardino convince Officer Tracy to undergo a head-to-toe makeover while still keeping the city safe.

programme.title: Female Forces: Breaking in the Rookie
programme.desc: Rookie officer Sara Rolfe completes her police training and gets a surprise visit from Betsy and Julie when they drop by the academy to check on her progress. Sara then gets a taste of real police work when she goes on patrol.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Messages from Beyond
programme.desc: A police officer calls Ron to help him uncover the mysteries surrounding his night job as a security officer at a banquet hall.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Stirring Up the Dead
programme.desc: The owner of a restaurant and bar, undergoing renovations, calls CPD for help when paranormal activity starts to scare away employees and brings construction to a halt.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Meagan's Ghost
programme.desc: A concerned homeowner contacts CPD when her houseguest is choked in her sleep by an unseen force.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Victim's Revenge
programme.desc: The team finds that a young girl's suicide in 1916 could have been a murder and that her aggressor is still hanging around the campus hoping to find his next victim.

programme.title: Female Forces: Red Alert
programme.desc: Betsy, Julie and Tracy release some aggression and train for hand-to-hand combat with their nightstick batons. Officer Dawn Yorke deals with a belligerent homeless man accused of casing a parking lot for possible theft.

programme.desc: Plenty of tears are shed by suspects and officers; Betsy escorts a war veteran.

programme.title: American Justice: Blood on the Staircase
programme.desc: North Carolina author Michael Peterson was convicted of murdering his wife for her insurance money.

programme.title: American Justice: Free to Murder Again
programme.desc: The case of Kenneth McDuff, the most infamous sexual predator in Texas history, sent to death row for three murders.

programme.title: Nightwatch: United We Stand
programme.desc: On the fourth of July in New Orleans, the heat seems to trigger havoc in the streets. Holly, Nick and Keeley arrive at a bloody scene where a woman could lose her arm after a bar fight. Then, a first responder is assaulted at the scene of an accident.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Dark Side of the City
programme.desc: For the men and women on the Nightwatch, two things never stop: the calls and the questions. The first responders do everything they can to save the victims of several shootings, a drug overdose and more.

programme.title: Casanova Killers: A Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: A woman is found dead and her boyfriend tries to help police catch the killer.

programme.title: Casanova Killers: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Up and coming lawyer Michael Fletcher can barely keep it together as he calls police to his suburban Detroit home. Upon arrival, officers find Fletcher's wife, Leann, dead from an apparent accidental self-inflicted gunshot wound.

programme.title: Casanova Killers: Lethal Lovers
programme.desc: In Huntington Beach two well respected doctors, Carolyn and Ken Stahl, are found shot to death on the side of a highway. As police unravel this baffling case they find the power couple had a less than perfect marriage.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams: Casey Anthony
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams take a deeper look at the case and uncover new information relevant to the trial.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Jam Master Jay
programme.desc: Marcia Clark dives deep into the world of hip hop to search for the truth of what really happened to legendary DJ, Jam Master Jay. Marcia will navigate the twists and turns of numerous theories that surround the mysterious death of this icon.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Savage Country
programme.desc: On their way to Oregon, young lovebirds Kevin Thorpe and Laura Craig come face-to-face with evil on the mountainous, desolate back roads of Northern California.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Till Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Married couple Doug and Rozina Anderson's decision to take a long weekend in the peaceful woods of Northern California turns out to be a fateful mistake.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Get Out
programme.desc: Young love leads fifteen-year old high school standout Jessica Keen down an increasingly rebellious path that culminates in a night of grave and unfathomable terror in rural Madison County, Ohio.

programme.title: American Monster: Push Record
programme.desc: In Colorado, second-time spouses Harold and Toni Henthorn seem to dote on their young daughter and each other, until their idyllic life is shattered by a deadly hiking accident. Their happy home videos conceal a deadly predator who nearly escaped justice.

programme.title: Diabolical: Hands That Rob the Cradle
programme.desc: In early 1980, two eerily similar crimes occur 400 miles apart. They both leave young mother dead and an infant child stolen. Years later, police unravel a plot so cold-blooded, it leaves everyone even seasoned homicide detectives in utter shock.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Michael Crump may have been a small-time drug dealer, but he wasn't violent; that is, until he was convicted of murdering another local dealer in an apparent robbery gone bad. Now his family has reached out to Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva for help.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Route 29
programme.desc: In August 2013, a 17-year-old rising social media star and high school athlete disappeared along the infamous Route 29. A massive search by local and federal authorities yielded zero results until a security video revealed a chilling clue.

programme.title: Diabolical: Hands That Rob the Cradle
programme.desc: In early 1980, two eerily similar crimes occur 400 miles apart. They both leave young mother dead and an infant child stolen. Years later, police unravel a plot so cold-blooded, it leaves everyone even seasoned homicide detectives in utter shock.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Michael Crump may have been a small-time drug dealer, but he wasn't violent; that is, until he was convicted of murdering another local dealer in an apparent robbery gone bad. Now his family has reached out to Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva for help.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Route 29
programme.desc: In August 2013, a 17-year-old rising social media star and high school athlete disappeared along the infamous Route 29. A massive search by local and federal authorities yielded zero results until a security video revealed a chilling clue.

programme.title: American Monster: Push Record
programme.desc: In Colorado, second-time spouses Harold and Toni Henthorn seem to dote on their young daughter and each other, until their idyllic life is shattered by a deadly hiking accident. Their happy home videos conceal a deadly predator who nearly escaped justice.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder on Red River
programme.desc: More than 15 years after a Texas woman was found dead, floating in a river, a former Marine and a filmmaker think they can find her killer. See if they can solve a cold case that has haunted her Texas town since Mother's Day, 2007.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Blood in the Sand
programme.desc: The murder of two teen girls on the same California beach, six years apart, shocked residents of San Diego when it happened. The DNA uncovered in the case, decades later, would stun them a second time when it led to someone inside the police department.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Target on Her Back
programme.desc: 24-year-old grocery store worker, Caroline Nosal befriends her introvert colleague Christopher O'Kroley. Chris is eager to make friends with Caroline possibly too eager. Caroline complains to store management about Chris things don't turn out as planned.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Living a Lie
programme.desc: Bob Peterson invites himself to his co-workers Gene and Jaye-Jaye Thurnau's new home to give them a housewarming present. That evening, Jaye-Jaye leaves the guys to run an errand.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Unfriendly Community
programme.desc: One June morning cleaning lady Myra heads into the property office and is confronted by a nightmare scene. The office has been ransacked and there is blood everywhere- property manager Melinda Schaefer is dead. Police work hard to get justice.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Killing on the Cape: Part One
programme.desc: A former A-list writer is found murdered in her Cape Cod home. In the aftermath, rumours run rampant as a tangled web of relationships is revealed. Nothing would prepare the community for the shock of who was arrested, and the stunning claim he made.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Killing on the Cape: Part Two
programme.desc: A former A-list writer is found murdered in her Cape Cod home. In the aftermath, rumours run rampant as a tangled web of relationships is revealed. Nothing would prepare the community for the shock of who was arrested, and the stunning claim he made.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: A pretty social media sensation and an NBA superstar connect online. But as the relationship heats up, extortion and threats of violence turn their romance into a nightmare.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: No Good Deed
programme.desc: In 2005, a 28 year-old photographer and college student is found murdered in his Arlington, Texas apartment. Investigators suspect that the victim's generosity and willingness to help those in need may have lead a killer to his door.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Last Dance
programme.desc: When a 16 year-old ballet dancer is assaulted and murdered in her home, Portsmouth, Virginia detectives mine dark family secrets and high school social circles to bring an obsessed killer to justice.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Absent Teacher
programme.desc: In 1993, an elementary school teacher goes missing after her first day at a new job. Over the next two months, investigators sift through clues, piecing together the heartbreaking truth behind the young educator's sudden disappearance.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Vicious Voyeur
programme.desc: The killer of a young North Carolina woman keeps police guessing until he slips up and detectives get what they need to put him behind bars.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Wicked Witness
programme.desc: What begins as a frantic 911 call to help an assaulted neighbor ends in the most bizarre investigation the small town of Walsenburg, Colorado has ever seen - complete with a twisted tale of torture, family secrets, and a fallen Jehovah's Witness.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Bombers
programme.desc: Go inside the most dominant and lethal military aircraft, from the bombers that won the War to the B-52, from the stealth B-2 to the most advanced and top secret bombers of the future.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: Bulgaria's Murder Service
programme.desc: The crimes perpetrated in the name of Communism remain largely unexplored. Millions of people died in a secret war with the West. Hear the extraordinary story of the Bulgarian secret department called Service Seven (a killer force operating worldwide).

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Esther Ludwig Mansion
programme.desc: Black Dog Salvage travels to Pennsylvania to save what they can from Esther Ludwig's mansion before it gets demolished. They hope to reclaim some of the mansion's all-original items, such as chandeliers, built-ins and mantles.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Virginia Victorian Home
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to Hot Springs, VA, to salvage mantles, cabinets, sinks and a round window from a late Victorian-style home.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Wayne Lanes Bowling Alley
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Wayne Lanes in Waynesboro, VA, to salvage bowling balls, bowling pins, bowling shoes and whatever else they can find in the alley. Robert is determined to redeem himself from last season's bowling fiasco.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Ludwig Mansion
programme.desc: Black Dog Salvage returns to the Ludwig mansion in Pennsylvania to get what they left behind from the first salvage. This time they concentrate on the outside including the roof tiles, windows, and the boiler room.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Victorian Free Classic House
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs return to Hot Springs, VA, to salvage another home before it gets demolished. The house has some great Eastlake hardware worth salvaging as well as Majorca tile, mantles and pocket doors.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: 19th Century Corncrib
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Hamburg, PA, to carefully deconstruct a corncrib being sure to take plenty of notes and pictures so they can reassemble it accurately.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: High Altitude Hideout
programme.desc: Adventure seeker Joey Caiafa sets out to build a mountaintop hideout outside of Leadville, Colorado. He enlists the help of his friends and an architectural designer to trick out the solar-powered space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: Innovative designer and builder Graham Hill sets out to transform a steep Maui jungle plot into a 600-square-foot, hi-tech dream home with multiple moving walls and other space-maximizing features.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yellowstone River
programme.desc: The Lighthiser family sets out to build their dream home overlooking the Yellowstone River. Follow their journey as the activists and adventurers battle the elements to construct an uber-efficient house in a windswept valley in southwestern Montana.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny Forest Cottage
programme.desc: New York newlyweds escape the city to build their first home upstate in a secluded part of the Hudson Valley. Utilizing timber felled from their own property, they plan to craft their own tiny house completely off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: Innovative designer and builder Graham Hill sets out to transform a steep Maui jungle plot into a 600-square-foot, hi-tech dream home with multiple moving walls and other space-maximizing features.

programme.desc: The Lighthiser family sets out to build their dream home overlooking the Yellowstone River. Follow their journey as the activists and adventurers battle the elements to construct an uber-efficient house in a windswept valley in southwestern Montana.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Pacific Coast Rustic Loggia
programme.desc: A desperate yard gets a complete transformation including a new paver patio, an oversized metal fire pit with seating, and a massive reclaimed covered, three-sided loggia loaded with a flat screen television, kegorator and custom storage cabinet.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Treasure Hunting
programme.desc: Rob and his right-hand man, Wes, are on a treasure hunt for their next project in Palm Beach, Florida. They check out four properties, but they all need a ton of work. After a scary situation leaves them spooked, the choice is clear.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Shell Shocked
programme.desc: After surveying the property and running the numbers, Rob determines they have to start from scratch. It becomes a race against time as he and the crew only have 90 days to demo and rebuild the shell.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Pool Problems
programme.desc: At Rob's latest project, the current state of the pool spells disaster. It's small and square, not to mention filthy, so Rob designs a whole new look for this outdated eyesore to make it pool party-worthy.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Icing on the Kitchen
programme.desc: The current kitchen at Rob's project in Palm Beach lacks the space and grace that Rob is looking for. He and the ninjas come up with a plan to give the heart of the home a full face lift with plenty of bling.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: The Backyard Bling Out
programme.desc: This home's big backyard is a huge selling point but there's a lot of wasted space. Rob and the ninjas get down to business installing a landing pad, a luxury hanger and getting the run-down tennis court ready for action.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Working Out the Foyer
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas get a workout tackling a massive chandelier in the foyer and heavy exercise equipment in the club room. In the game room, a custom mural makes a statement and adds a touch of old-school charm to a modern space.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Extreme Exterior
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas take the exterior to the extreme by installing estate gates and revamping the landscape. It's all hands on deck to give this property some kicking curb appeal that will bring buyers to the door.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: A Modern Master
programme.desc: Rob takes the master bedroom to the edge by adding an exclusive balcony and luxurious details fit for modern royalty. Custom drapes and plenty of bling are enough to make this master suite sing.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Bringing Back the Bath
programme.desc: Rob and his crew pull out all the stops to make the master bathroom one for the history books. A custom stretch ceiling takes the space to new heights, while a gold-plated bathtub is a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Racing to the Reveal
programme.desc: With the open house days just away, Rob and the crew are putting the pedal to the metal to finish their most epic renovation to date.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Skylight Surprise
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to install a full bath and enlarge the master suite as she continues to renovate the 1938 cottage. She successfully creates a hidden playroom in the kids' bedroom, but fails to win her dad's approval on her plan for the backyard shed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Masters
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets two barbecue brainiacs who have mastered the art of marrying heat and meat to turn out top-notch barbecue. Pitmaster Christopher Prieto teaches students the science of smoking and seasoning meats at Prime Barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Getting Piggy With It
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes hog-wild at two legendary barbecue restaurants located in America's Barbecue Belt. At A&R Bar-B-Que in Memphis, Roger helps owner Andrew Pillard load racks of St. Louis-style ribs into custom wood-fired pits.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Tex-Mex
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels across America searching for the 12 best Tex-Mex dishes from beans, meats and peppers to salsas and gooey cheeses.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Fried
programme.desc: From seafood and beef to pork and cheese, all the best foods taste better fried and Roger Mooking is scouring the country in search of the 12 best fried-food dishes. He's hanging out with fried-food-loving chefs learning all their secrets.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Finger-Licking Good
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli joins Michael Symon at one of his favorite Manhattan spots, where they combine a bottomless beer selection with the most high-octane hot dog known to man.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Smokey
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, where a place he went as a kid combines several classic sweets to make a one-of-a-kind dessert burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue Boss of All Sandwiches
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a meaty stacked sandwich and a beefy ballpark dog. In Oklahoma City, a gas station-turned-burger joint serves a fried apple and brie cheeseburger to fuel the soul.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked, Stuffed and Smothered
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon devours a delicious dumpling-inspired pork and shrimp burger and an elevated pub food classic. In Shreveport, La., a wood-fired pizza is topped with spicy roast chicken and sweet corn.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Scottsdale, AZ
programme.desc: Casey’s culinary quest brings him to Scottsdale, Arizona where he’ll fry up a Latin staple, take on a stone age feast, and take on a four-pound deli platter in the Chompie’s Day at the Deli Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Mystic, CT
programme.desc: Casey's tasty travels take him to Mystic, Connecticut to conquer land with a totally bonkers burger, sea with a crazy coastal feast and food with a ridiculously massive sundae in Mel's Downtown Creamery's Big Kahuna Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Choccywoccydoodah: Spring Is in the Air

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Spinning, Lifelike Cakes
programme.desc: A flaming fire truck cake comes with its own water hose and a baker shocks the crowd when she reveals her produce stand doesn't include any actual vegetables.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Levitating, Robotic Cake
programme.desc: A levitating wedding cake amazes a room full of guests while a shiny robot cake makes waves in New Jersey. Later, working hydraulics take a car-shaped cake up a notch and a five-foot-tall cake makes a wedding display like no other.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Bears And Pinball Cakes
programme.desc: Bakers in Texas create an unbearably cool cake that has an element of surprise and a knight in shining armor becomes a cake fit for Medieval royalty.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Fiery, Fairytale Cakes
programme.desc: A waterfront wedding cake gets its own functioning river and an island-themed cake erupts with Polynesian flair. Later, a fairytale Vegas wedding cake is taller than the bride.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Local Legends
programme.desc: Alfonso takes you on a tour of local legends, from Tennessee's iconic Jack Daniel's Whiskey to the Fannie May factory in Ohio where sweet Buckeyes are made. He also finds out how a novel mix of hard candy and gum became the Charms Blow Pop.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Tongue Twister
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro tries Warheads Extreme Sour Hard Candy, a treat that almost requires a warning label, sees how Frank's RedHot gets its heat and takes a peek at a dynamite mole sauce from Rico Chicken Tamales.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Farm Fresh
programme.desc: Alfonso showcases foods with farm-fresh ingredients. Go hog wild over Benton's Bacon, see the Georgian pecans going into Carolina Foods' Duchess Pecan Pies.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Quick Fix
programme.desc: Alfonso comes to the rescue with quick fixes. P.F. Chang's Home Menu Beef and Broccoli frozen entree makes weeknight meals easy and Chocolate Chip Quaker Chewy Bars are a great snack for kids and adults both.

programme.title: Good Eats: Head Games
programme.desc: Get inside the cabbage's head to understand what makes this sensitive vegetable tick.

programme.title: Good Eats: Flat Is Beautiful
programme.desc: Alton Brown claims we won't be satisfied with pizza until we've taken matters into our own hands. Rise high into the world of yeast and learn how (and why) to lay tiles in your oven. With Alton's recipe for Pizza Pizzas.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Impossible Summit of Mt. Neverrest!
programme.desc: Scrooge and Huey are determined to be the first to set foot atop an impossible summit, but the mountain holds a treacherous secret which had them test both their commitment and survival.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Ace Dragon! On the Rise!
programme.desc: After training with Valt Aoi, Dante Koryu is ready to take on the world with his new Bey, Ace Dragon!

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Battling on the Wing!

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: This dark odyssey continues as Dolores struggles to make her way in the outside world.

programme.title: Movie: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: Former hitman John Wick, pursued by assassins after being excommunicated by the murder-for-hire underworld, attempts to have the bounty on his head removed.

programme.title: The Plot Against America
programme.desc: On the eve of the 1940 election cycle, President Roosevelt finds himself challenged by a political outsider, the aviator Charles Lindbergh, who is staking his insurgent campaign on neutrality with Nazi Germany and accusations against American Jews.

programme.title: Avenue 5
programme.desc: A luxury cruise vessel travels the solar system in this sci-fi comedy.

programme.title: High Maintenance
programme.desc: When a patient asks her out on a date, dental hygienist, mother, and caretaker Nora wonders if she can put her needs first for once. Meanwhile, two former friends share an awkward ride and The Guy has a rideshare experience of his own.

programme.title: Movie: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Amidst escalating violence in New York, a young man seeks to avenge his father's murder and restore peace to the area.

programme.title: Movie: Crimson Peak
programme.desc: A beautiful young author is whisked away to a mountaintop mansion by a mysterious, yet handsome stranger and his sister. The house holds many deep, dark secrets that soon threaten her very existence.

programme.title: 24/7: Kelly Slater
programme.desc: A revealing look inside the the surfer's life as he prepares for the Billabong Pipe Masters in Oahu, Hawaii.

programme.title: Movie: Glass
programme.desc: A man with multiple personalities, including one with superhuman strength and a brutal nature, joins forces with a super-genius to reveal to the world that comic book villains are real, but they're opposed by a loving father with incredible strength.

programme.title: Movie: Truth or Dare
programme.desc: A harmless game of truth or dare between young friends takes a deadly turn when something starts killing those who refuse to answer truthfully or to follow through on a dare. One of its players tries to figure out how to end the game before it's too late.

programme.title: Movie: Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald
programme.desc: True to his promise, the dark wizard Grindelwald escapes from custody while being transferred to Europe to answer for his crimes, and begins assembling followers who share his ambitions, but he's opposed by a young wizard with a love of magical beasts.

programme.title: Movie: Les Misérables
programme.desc: In France during the 19th century, a man who has been searched for by the police for breaking his parole tries to make things right. He decides to take care of the daughter of a factory worker, not realizing the decision will change their lives.

programme.title: Women of Troy
programme.desc: 'Women of Troy' is an HBO Sports documentary exploring the transcendent career of the Cheryl Miller-led USC Trojans and their impact on women’s basketball.

programme.title: Movie: Punch Drunk Love
programme.desc: A beleaguered small-business owner embarks on a romantic journey with a mysterious woman.

programme.title: Movie: Ma
programme.desc: A lonely, middle-aged woman befriends teenagers and allows them to organize a party at her home. The teens think they couldn't have it any better, until strange occurrences start taking place that point to something being off with their host.

programme.title: My Brilliant Friend: The Story of a New Name
programme.desc: Elena and Lila continue their journey into adulthood.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programme.desc: Comedian John Oliver offers his satirical take on news, current events and politics.

programme.title: High Maintenance
programme.desc: When a patient asks her out on a date, dental hygienist, mother, and caretaker Nora wonders if she can put her needs first for once. Meanwhile, two former friends share an awkward ride and The Guy has a rideshare experience of his own.

programme.title: AXIOS
programme.desc: Highlighting current topics in politics, business and technology.

programme.title: Movie: The Nun
programme.desc: A priest with a past that haunts him and a novitiate on the brink of her final vows travel to a remote Romanian abbey on orders from the Vatican to investigate a nun's death, risking their lives and their souls when they encounter an evil force.

programme.desc: A small town goes berserk anticipating the return of sexy and mysterious, Roxy Carmichael.

programme.title: Movie: Happy Death Day

programme.title: Movie: Captive State
programme.desc: A resistance group struggles to overcome a decade-long alien invasion.

programme.title: Our Cartoon President: G-7
